# KIL Construction

> General contractor in Mondovi, WI serving western Wisconsin. Custom cabinetry and furniture, new construction, and remodeling. Licensed and insured. Free estimates. Call (715) 279-1241 or email kil.con.contact@gmail.com.

KIL Construction is a licensed and insured general contractor offering new construction (framing, drywall, decks, siding, complete builds), remodels (kitchens, baths, basements, doors and windows), and custom furniture and cabinetry (built-ins, tables, trim). Work is guaranteed and estimates are free. Based in Mondovi, WI 54755, serving Mondovi and the surrounding western Wisconsin area.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kilcon.work/): Overview, project highlights, and client reviews
- [New Construction](https://kilcon.work/services/new-construction): Framing, drywall, decks, siding, and complete builds
- [Remodels](https://kilcon.work/services/remodels): Kitchens, baths, basements, doors and windows
- [Custom Furniture & Cabinetry](https://kilcon.work/services/furniture): Cabinetry, built-ins, tables, and trim
- [Projects](https://kilcon.work/projects): Photo gallery of completed work
- [Reviews](https://kilcon.work/reviews): Client reviews; leave a review at https://kilcon.work/reviews#leave-review
- [Contact](https://kilcon.work/contact): Request an estimate or ask a question
